holdings.infoBox: EWZS is an equity ETF with a total of 80 individual holdings. The top holdings are BLK CSH FND TREASURY SL AGENCY stock at 5.27%, TOTVS at 5.27%, Lojas Renner at 5.09%, Sendas Distribuidora at 3.69%, and Companhia de Saneamento de Minas Gerais at 3.68%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI Brazil Small-Cap ETF (EWZS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Brazil Small Cap index, a market-cap-weighted index of Brazilian small-cap firms. EWZS was launched on Sep 29, 2010 and is issued by BlackRock.
